description: A graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor on a dark navy gradient background. The top portion is a black-and-white photograph of the exterior facade of a federal building bearing the carved stone lettering 'DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION'. Centered over it in large white serif italic type is 'A Failure of' followed by the much larger bold all-caps 'BUREAUCRACY'. Below this are three overlaid clipped torn-paper style news headline cards arranged in a collage, each with a news outlet logo: (1) NBC NEWS - 'US high school students lose ground in math and reading, continuing yearslong decline'; (2) NEW YORK POST - 'Damning nationwide test shows US kids' reading levels plummeted to lowest level in 32-year history - and Republicans are blaming ‘woke’ education'; (3) USA TODAY - 'US student scores hit new lows in Nation's Report Card'. The colors are muted with white text.
notable_text: A Failure of BUREAUCRACY; 'US high school students lose ground in math and reading, continuing yearslong decline' (NBC News); 'US kids' reading levels plummeted to lowest level in 32-year history' (New York Post); 'US student scores hit new lows in Nation's Report Card' (USA Today)
